sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data (id UInt32, value Float64, created_at DateTime, nullable_value Nullable(Float64));
SELECT quantileExactInclusive(0.5)(value) AS median_value FROM (SELECT value FROM test_data WHERE NOT (nullable_value IS NULL));
SELECT id, quantileExactInclusive(0.25)(value) AS q1, quantileExactInclusive(0.75)(value) AS q3 FROM test_data GROUP BY id HAVING NOT (q1 < 0 AND q3 > 10);
SELECT id, quantileExactInclusive(0.6)(value) FROM (SELECT id, NOT (value < 5) AS is_high, value FROM test_data) WHERE is_high = true;
CREATE TABLE temp_data AS (SELECT value, created_at FROM test_data WHERE NOT (nullable_value IS NULL) AND value IS NOT NULL);
SELECT quantileExactInclusive(0.9)(value) FROM temp_data WHERE NOT (value < (SELECT quantileExactInclusive(0.1)(value) FROM test_data));
SELECT NOT (quantileExactInclusive(0.5)(value) > 10) AS is_median_high FROM test_data;

SELECT id, value, CASE WHEN value IS NULL THEN 'NULL' ELSE 'NOT NULL' END AS value_state, quantileExactInclusive(0.9)(value) OVER (PARTITION BY value_state) AS high_percentile FROM test_data ORDER BY high_percentile DESC;
SELECT id, NOT (quantileExactInclusive(0.5)(value) BETWEEN 0 AND 10) AS is_median_out_of_range FROM test_data;
